results.title: Google Workspace Gmail
results.description: Documentation for developers to build, automate, and enhance Gmail solutions using APIs, add-ons, Apps Script, and AI-powered features within Google Workspace.

results.title: Google Workspace Drive
results.description: Google Workspace Drive provides APIs and tools for developers to integrate with Google Drive, enabling file management, sharing, and automation within Google Workspace applications.

results.title: Google Workspace Add-ons
results.description: Google Workspace Add-ons allow developers to extend and automate Google Workspace applications using Apps Script or any preferred coding language and infrastructure.

results.title: Google Workspace Admin Console
results.description: Provides tools and APIs for developers to automate and manage Google Workspace Admin console tasks, including user and group management, device control, and various administrative settings.

results.title: Google Forms
results.description: Google Forms provides developer tools and APIs (Add-ons, Apps Script, Forms API) to extend, automate, and integrate with Google Forms, enabling custom solutions and programmatic interaction.

results.title: Google Sheets
results.description: Google Sheets allows developers to extend, automate, and share spreadsheets using Add-ons, Apps Script, and REST APIs for programmatic interaction.

results.title: Google Keep API
results.description: Google Keep API enables developers to create, manage, and modify Google Keep notes and content in enterprise environments, including resolving security issues identified by cloud security software.

results.title: Gmail API
results.description: A RESTful API for programmatic access to Gmail mailboxes, enabling applications to read, send, manage, and organize email data.

results.title: Google Workspace Chat API
results.description: Build Google Chat apps to integrate services and automate tasks within conversations, enabling users to access information and take action without leaving the chat interface.

results.title: Google Workspace Admin
results.description: Google Workspace Admin Help provides comprehensive support and resources for administrators to set up, manage, and troubleshoot Google Workspace services and users within their organization.

results.title: Google Workspace MCP Server
results.description: Google Workspace MCP Server written for Streamable HTTP transport & SSE with support for Calendar, Gmail, Docs & Drive!

results.title: Google Docs
results.description: Develop solutions for Google Docs by extending its functionality with add-ons, automating tasks with Apps Script, or integrating with your services via REST APIs.

results.title: Google Agentspace
results.description: A suite of cloud-based AI agents powered by Google-quality search and Gemini's advanced capabilities to transform knowledge work.

results.title: Squarespace Developer Platform
results.description: The Squarespace Developer Platform enables developers to build fully custom Squarespace websites and integrate with third-party tools, offering access to template files, commerce APIs, local development, Git integration, and a JSON data store.

results.title: Google Tasks API
results.description: Google Tasks API enables developers to programmatically search, read, and update Google Tasks content, and automate task management through REST API and Apps Script.

results.title: Terraform Google Workspace Users Groups Automation
results.description: A Terraform module to manage Google Workspace users, groups, and roles, with support for custom schemas and various authentication methods.

results.title: WSM (Workspace Manager)
results.description: WSM (Workspace Manager) is a powerful CLI tool for managing multi-repository workspaces with git worktrees, simplifying coordinated development across projects spanning multiple repositories.

results.title: Google Calendar API
results.description: The Google Calendar API is a RESTful API that allows developers to access and manage most features available in the Google Calendar web interface, including events, calendars, and user settings.

results.title: Google Meet REST API
results.description: The Google Meet REST API allows developers to create and manage Google Meet meetings, retrieve participant information and meeting artifacts, and subscribe to meeting events directly from their applications.

results.title: DevSpace
results.description: DevSpace is a client-only developer tool for cloud-native development with Kubernetes, enabling developers to build, test, and debug applications directly inside Kubernetes with hot reloading and unified deployment workflows.

results.title: Google Workspace Apps Script Samples
results.description: A collection of sample code and projects for the Google Apps Script platform, a JavaScript platform in the cloud, demonstrating various Google APIs and services.

results.title: Google Apps Script Reference
results.description: Explore the comprehensive reference documentation for Google Apps Script, enabling you to extend, automate, and share across Google Workspace applications like Sheets, Docs, Drive, and Gmail.

results.title: Google Calendar API
results.description: Google Calendar API v3 is a RESTful API that enables developers to create, read, update, and manage calendar events, access control rules, and calendar settings for Google Calendar.

results.title: Google Slides API
results.description: Google Slides API lets you create and modify Google Slides presentations programmatically, enabling apps to generate beautiful slide decks automatically from user and system-provided data.

results.title: Gmail Processor
results.description: Gmail Processor is an open-source Google Apps Script library that automates the processing of Gmail messages and attachments by executing actions like storing files in Google Drive or logging data to spreadsheets, based on powerful matching criteria.

results.title: Gemini Developer API
results.description: The Gemini Developer API provides access to Google's advanced AI models for building applications with text generation, image understanding, and more.

results.title: Gmail Processor
results.description: Gmail Processor is an open-source Google Apps Script library that automates email processing by executing actions based on matching criteria, such as storing attachments or logging data.

results.title: Google Chat Samples
results.description: This repository provides code samples for interactive Google Chat apps not built as Google Workspace add-ons, featuring various functionalities like basic responses, card formatting, Pub/Sub integration, and user authentication.

results.title: Google API PHP Client
results.description: The Google API Client Library for PHP enables developers to interact with Google APIs such as Gmail, Drive, and YouTube directly from their PHP applications.

results.title: Google Developer Documentation Style Guide
results.description: A comprehensive guide providing principles and rules for writing clear, consistent, and effective technical documentation for Google's developer products.
